title: commelina communis var. exserta
intro: Commelina communis var. exserta, also known as Spurred Centella or Exserted Spurred Centella, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the greater commelina plant, belonging to the Commelinaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Commelina communis var. exserta include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating various health conditions such as fever and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and interactions.
